notes: Solid Tetris implementation with hold, ghost piece, next queue, particles, and proper line clearing; minor issue with DAS (auto-repeat) logic using floating-point equality check that may occasionally miss the first repeat trigger.
Solid implementation with DAS, ghost piece, and hold, but rotation uses non-square matrices causing pieces to wobble around their top-left corner instead of a fixed center.

A solid and mostly complete Tetris with hold/ghost/queue and no obvious runtime errors, but it lacks proper wall-kick/lock-delay finesse and has some control/state handling quirks that keep it well short of flawless.
